title: Crispy Smoky Bao
description: A fusion of Vietnamese and Chinese flavors in a crispy, smoky bao. Perfect as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or a toaster oven to 400°F (200°C).
Cut the Smoky Bao Dough into small balls and flatten them slightly into disks.
Heat the Vegan Vegetable Oil in the pan or toaster oven until it reaches 350°F (175°C).
Fry the bao disks for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Drain the fried bao on paper towels.
In a separate pan, heat the Soy Sauce and Sesame Oil over medium heat.
Add the diced Crispy Smoked Tofu and cook until heated through.
Assemble the bao by placing a few pieces of the tofu mixture onto a fried bao disk, followed by some shredded Crisp Lettuce and chopped Cilantro.
